# 🚨 IMPORTANT: DO NOT EDIT FILES IN THIS FOLDER
# 
# This public folder is for Firebase deployment only.
# 
# The SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH is: ../index.html (root folder)
# 
# This folder gets populated by the build script before deployment.
# Any edits here will be OVERWRITTEN.
# 
# To make changes:
# 1. Edit ../index.html in the root folder
# 2. Run: npm run build (copies root index.html here)
# 3. Run: firebase deploy
